label: Transparent Koi Scale motif
prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: transparent PNG motif cutout for Morphous design system, final asset public/systems/morphous-koi-scale/motif.png
Primary request: Create an ornamental koi scale pattern motif cutout inspired by a koi pond, using vivid koi orange, porcelain white, ink black markings, and jade water accents.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Subject: a compact overlapping fan of koi fish scales, each scale like a rounded teardrop/arc tile with enamel-like orange and white surfaces, irregular black sumi markings, subtle jade-water rim highlights, clean decorative edges, and enough internal detail to read as koi scale pattern.
Composition: centered isolated object, generous padding, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no text, no watermark. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Style: polished semi-realistic ornamental cutout, high-resolution, crisp contour suitable for catalog preview and palette sampling.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 design-system board image for Morphous catalog, light mode
Primary request: Create a complete high-resolution 16:9 light-mode design system board for "Koi Scale", an ornamental content system inspired by koi orange/white/black scales and jade pond water.
Motif reference: centered ornamental koi scale pattern cutout with overlapping enamel scales, koi orange, porcelain white, ink black sumi markings, and jade-water accents.
Canvas: exactly 3840 x 2160 pixels, crisp readable text, white warm-rice-paper background with subtle jade water ripples and faint scale texture. No watermark, no fake brand names, no random logos.
Required readable sections with labels: title "Koi Scale", palette swatches named Koi Orange, Porcelain White, Sumi Black, Jade Water, Pond Mist, Vermilion Scale; typography guidance for English and Japanese; spacing/radius/shadow tokens; navigation rail and top nav; dashboard section with line chart, bar chart, donut chart, metric cards, and status indicators; content cards for articles/media; data table with readable column headers; form section with input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, segmented tabs; buttons in primary secondary ghost destructive states; badges, alert, tooltip, command search, empty loading and error states.
Visual language: ornamental editorial/content UI, scale-arc borders, black ink dividers, orange call-to-action accents, jade focus rings, porcelain cards, compact dashboard clarity. Use larger labels and fewer dense rows so text remains legible in gallery preview.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 design-system board image for Morphous catalog, dark mode
Primary request: Create a complete high-resolution 16:9 dark-mode design system board for "Koi Scale", matching the same ornamental content system as the light board, translated into dark mode.
Motif reference: ornamental koi scale pattern with overlapping enamel scales, koi orange, porcelain white, ink black sumi markings, and jade-water pond accents.
Canvas: exactly 3840 x 2160 pixels, crisp readable text, deep sumi-black and dark jade pond background, subtle water ripples and scale texture, porcelain text/cards, orange highlights, jade focus rings. No watermark, no fake brand names, no random logos.
Required readable sections with labels: title "Koi Scale Dark", palette swatches named Koi Orange, Porcelain White, Sumi Black, Jade Water, Pond Mist, Vermilion Scale; typography guidance for English and Japanese; spacing/radius/shadow tokens; navigation rail and top nav; dashboard section with line chart, bar chart, donut chart, metric cards, and status indicators; content cards for articles/media; data table with readable column headers; form section with input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, segmented tabs; buttons in primary secondary ghost destructive states; badges, alert, tooltip, command search, empty loading and error states.
Visual language: ornamental editorial/content UI for a dark koi pond interface, scale-arc borders, ink-brush dividers, glowing jade active states, orange calls to action, compact dashboard clarity. Use larger labels and fewer dense rows so text remains legible in gallery preview.
